scenario.name: SIP_INVITE_RECEIVE
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp 0 0 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
